parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id                       AS task_id,
  t.title                    AS task_title,
  CONVERT_TZ(t.created_at, '+00:00', '+05:30')               AS task_created_at,
  t.target_date              AS task_due_date,
  t.status                   AS task_status,
  t.parent_id                AS parent_id,

  TIMESTAMPDIFF(
    DAY,
    DATE(t.target_date),
    DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP())
  )                           AS overdue_days,

  m.id                       AS milestone_id,
  m.title                    AS milestone_title,

  rp.email                   AS task_owner_email,
  rp.firstname               AS task_owner_firstname,
  rp.lastname                AS task_owner_lastname,

  pm.id                      AS project_id,
  pm.title                   AS project_title,

  pmo.email                  AS project_manager_email,
  pmo.firstname              AS project_manager_firstname,
  pmo.lastname               AS project_manager_lastname,

  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.id ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.firstname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.lastname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.email ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_emails

FROM task_managements t

JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = t.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

JOIN spree_users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = t.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  DATE(t.target_date) < DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP())
  AND t.status NOT IN ('completed', 'closed', 'on_hold')
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL
  AND rp.organization_id IN (13, 14, 59, 84)

GROUP BY t.id;

parameters.subject: =Task Overdue: Immediate Attention Required – {{$json.task_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.project_manager_firstname}} {{$json.project_manager_lastname}},

The task {{$json.task_title}} has exceeded its planned due date and is currently overdue.

Overdue Task Details

Task Title {{$json.task_title}}
Assigned To {{$json.task_owner_firstname}} {{$json.task_owner_lastname}}
Task Created On {{$json.task_created_at}}
Task End On {{$json.task_due_date}}
Overdue By {{$json.overdue_days}} days
Current Status {{$json.task_status}}
Milestone {{$json.milestone_title || 'N/A'}}
Project {{$json.project_title}}
Task URL View Task

Please update the task with completion details or provide a revised plan to avoid escalation.

Regards,
PMO – Escalation Desk

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id                       AS task_id,
  t.title                    AS task_title,
  t.created_at               AS task_created_at,
  t.target_date              AS task_due_date,
  t.status                   AS task_status,
  t.parent_id                AS parent_id,

  -- overdue calculation
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(
    DAY,
    DATE(t.target_date),
    DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP())
  )                           AS overdue_days,

  -- milestone info
  m.id                       AS milestone_id,
  m.title                    AS milestone_title,

  -- responsible person (task owner)
  rp.email                   AS task_owner_email,
  rp.firstname               AS task_owner_firstname,
  rp.lastname                AS task_owner_lastname,

  -- project
  pm.id                      AS project_id,
  pm.title                   AS project_title,

  -- project manager
  pmo.email                  AS project_manager_email,
  pmo.firstname              AS project_manager_firstname,
  pmo.lastname               AS project_manager_lastname

FROM task_managements t

-- task owner (responsible person)
JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = t.responsible_person_id

-- milestone (optional)
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

-- project
JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

-- project manager
JOIN spree_users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

WHERE
  DATE(t.target_date) < DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP())   -- overdue
  AND t.status NOT IN ('completed', 'closed')  -- ignore completed tasks
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL;

  t.id                       AS task_id,
  t.title                    AS task_title,
  CONVERT_TZ(t.created_at, '+00:00', '+05:30')               AS task_created_at,
  t.target_date              AS task_due_date,
  t.status                   AS task_status,
  t.parent_id                AS parent_id,

  TIMESTAMPDIFF(
    DAY,
    DATE(t.target_date),
    DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP())
  )                           AS overdue_days,

  m.id                       AS milestone_id,
  m.title                    AS milestone_title,

  rp.email                   AS task_owner_email,
  rp.firstname               AS task_owner_firstname,
  rp.lastname                AS task_owner_lastname,

  pm.id                      AS project_id,
  pm.title                   AS project_title,

  pmo.email                  AS project_manager_email,
  pmo.firstname              AS project_manager_firstname,
  pmo.lastname               AS project_manager_lastname,

  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.id ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.firstname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.lastname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.email ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_emails

FROM task_managements t

JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = t.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

JOIN spree_users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = t.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  DATE(t.target_date) < DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP())
  AND t.status NOT IN ('completed', 'closed', 'on_hold')
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL

GROUP BY t.id;

parameters.subject: =Tasks Overdue: Immediate Attention Required – {{$json.total_overdue_tasks}} tasks assigned to you has overdue
parameters.html:
={{`

Dear ${$json.task_owner_name},

The following is the list of overdue tasks assigned to you. You currently have ${$json.total_overdue_tasks} overdue task(s).

Overdue Tasks Summary

${$json.tasks.map(task => ` `).join('')}
Task Created Due Overdue Status Project Link
${task.task_title} ${task.task_created_at} ${task.task_due_date} ${task.overdue_days} days ${task.task_status} ${task.project_title} View

Please update the tasks with completion details or provide a revised plan to avoid escalation.

Regards,
PMO – Escalation Desk

`}}

parameters.subject: =Action Required: {{$json.total_overdue_tasks}} Tasks Overdue Under Your Projects.
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.pm_name}},

The following is the list of overdue tasks under your projects. Your Projects currently have {{$json.total_overdue_tasks}} overdue task(s).

Overdue Task Details

{{ $json.tasks.map(task => ` `).join('') }}
Task Title Task Owner Milestone Project Created Due Overdue Status Link
${task.task_title} ${task.task_owner_name} ${task.milestone_title || 'N/A'} ${task.project_title} ${task.task_created_at} ${task.task_due_date} ${task.overdue_days} days ${task.task_status} View

Please review these tasks and take necessary action to avoid escalation.

Regards,
PMO – Escalation Desk

parameters.subject: =Action Required: {{$json.total_overdue_tasks}} tasks have been overdue under your observation.
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.observer_name}},

You, as an oberver to the following tasks, these tasks are overdue and require your attention. Total overdue tasks: {{$json.total_overdue_tasks}}

Overdue Task Details

{{$json.tasks.map(task => ` `).join('')}}
Task Title Owner Created Due Overdue Status Project Milestone Link
${task.task_title} ${task.task_owner_name} ${task.task_created_at} ${task.task_due_date} ${task.overdue_days} days ${task.task_status} ${task.project_title} ${task.milestone_title || 'N/A'} View

As an observer, please coordinate with the task owners and ensure timely closure.

Regards,
PMO – Escalation Desk
